calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Set For Trial On Nov-05-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Continued To Apr-06-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Luanne Rutherford, Esq., from Law Offices of McNamara, Ney, Beatty, Slattery, Borges & Ambacher LLP, 925-939-5330, for Defendant and moving party Yehuda Golani
Frank S. Moore, Esq., Law Office, 415-292-6091, for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT YEHUDA GOLANI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT:
Overruled as to the 6th and 7th causes of action.
Sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the 5th cause of action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Luanne Rutherford, Esq., from Law Offices of McNamara, Ney, Beatty, Slattery, Borges & Ambacher LLP, 925-939-5330, for Defendant and moving party Yehuda Golani
Frank S. Moore, Esq., Law Office, 415-292-6091, for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT YEHUDA GOLANI'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted as to the prayer for disgorgement of profits. Plaintiff is given 10 days leave to amend to add a prayer for restitution. One order for this motion and the demurrer signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
